rollback_procedure.description: To restore the 6 tracked files removed from git history, checkout from the SHA before this commit.
rollback_procedure.untracked_files_note: F5-008 (legacy/experiments/tart=always), F5-009 (debug_audio.wav), F5-010 (teste.wav) were UNTRACKED and are NOT recoverable from git history. They must be restored from an external backup if needed.
rollback_procedure.full_rollback: git revert HEAD --no-edit  # reverts the entire cleanup commit
